items.name: Chicken Tikka Roll
items.description: A tantalizing fusion of tender grilled chicken, aromatic spices, and fresh veggies, all wrapped in a soft, fluffy roll.
items.simplified_description: A grilled chicken wrap with spices and vegetables.

items.name: Milk Badam
items.description: A luscious Indian sweet that combines the richness of milk with the goodness of almonds.
items.simplified_description: A sweet dessert made with milk and almonds.

items.name: Masala Chai
items.description: Experience the comforting warmth and aromatic spices of Masala Chai, a traditional Indian tea brewed to perfection.

items.name: Noodles
items.description: A flavorful fusion of fresh vegetables and perfectly cooked noodles, tossed in aromatic spices.

items.name: Samosa
items.description: Our Samosa is a mouthwatering Indian snack with a flavorful potato filling, served hot and fresh.
items.simplified_description: A fried pastry filled with spiced potatoes.

items.name: Crispy Aloo Tikki
items.description: A delightful Indian street food treat that bursts with the goodness of mashed potatoes and aromatic spices.

items.name: Chilli Chicken
items.description: Indo Chinese dish featuring chicken tossed in spicy sauce.

items.name: Butter Chicken
items.description: A symphony of flavors that will transport you to a culinary paradise.
items.simplified_description: Chicken in a creamy tomato sauce.

items.name: Goat Curry
items.description: A flavorful Indian dish made with tender pieces of goat meat simmered in a rich and savory curry sauce.
items.simplified_description: Goat meat in a spicy curry.

items.name: Chilli Paneer
items.description: Indo Chinese dish with paneer cooked in a spicy sauce.

items.name: Chicken Tikka
items.description: Grilled pieces of chicken marinated in Indian spices.

items.name: Soya Chaap
items.description: Vegetarian skewer made from soy protein, marinated and grilled.

items.name: Idli Samber
items.description: A South Indian dish made of steamed rice cakes served with lentil soup.
items.simplified_description: Steamed rice cakes with lentil soup.

items.name: Masala Dosa
items.description: A traditional South Indian crepe made from fermented rice and lentil batter, filled with spicy mashed potatoes.
items.simplified_description: A crepe filled with spiced potatoes.

items.name: Amritsari Kulcha
items.description: A stuffed Indian bread known for its richness and flavor. Simple explanation: Often filled with spiced potatoes, this is a popular dish from Punjab.

items.name: Dosa
items.description: South India's iconic delight made of a fermented batter of rice and lentils. Simple explanation: Dosas are thin crepes that can be served plain or filled.
items.simplified_description: Thin crepes made from rice and lentils.

items.name: Pav Bhaji
items.description: The ultimate comfort food made with a spicy vegetable mash served with buttered bread.

items.name: Lassies, Drinks, Chai & Coffee, Shakes
items.description: A variety of traditional Indian drinks and shakes to accompany your meal.
